case_title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. DARIN CODON ET AL

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CODON, DARIN DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
